meaning: <德>n.(德国、奥地利的) 实科中学,实科学校(着重理工科和现代语教育)
examples: The former student, dressed in black combat gear, entered the Albertville-Realschule in Winnenden, a town of 27,000 near Stuttgart, at around 9.30 am and began firing.
